name: Western Leadbank CSI SOE Bonus Index Enhanced Fund (LOF)
summary: Western Leadbank CSI SOE Bonus Index Enhanced Fund (LOF) is a fund managed by Western Leadbank that tracks the CSI State-Owned Enterprise (SOE) Bonus Index with an enhanced strategy. The fund primarily invests in high-dividend-paying SOEs listed in China, and it is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF), allowing it to be traded on the stock exchange.
